widgets_values: (字幕，水印，文字:1.3)，blurry, out of focus, overexposed, underexposed, low contrast, washed out colors, excessive noise, grainy texture, poor lighting, flickering, motion blur, distorted proportions, unnatural skin tones, deformed facial features, asymmetrical face, missing facial features, extra limbs, disfigured hands, wrong hand count, artifacts around text, unreadable text on shirt or hat, incorrect lettering on cap (“PNTR”), incorrect t-shirt slogan (“JUST DO IT”), missing microphone, misplaced microphone, inconsistent perspective, camera shake, incorrect depth of field, background too sharp, background clutter, distracting reflections, harsh shadows, inconsistent lighting direction, color banding, cartoonish rendering, 3D CGI look, unrealistic materials, uncanny valley effect, incorrect ethnicity, wrong gender, exaggerated expressions, smiling, laughing, exaggerated sadness, wrong gaze direction, eyes looking at camera, mismatched lip sync, silent or muted audio, distorted voice, robotic voice, echo, background noise, off-sync audio, missing sniff sounds, incorrect dialogue, added dialogue, repetitive speech, jittery movement, awkward pauses, incorrect timing, unnatural transitions, inconsistent framing, tilted camera, missing door or shelves, missing shallow depth of field, flat lighting, inconsistent tone, cinematic oversaturation, stylized filters, or AI artifacts.

Shot 1 (Full Shot, 2s) Low-angle full shot. The camera slowly pulls back to reveal the full battlefield: the massive dragon skeleton lies across the wasteland, the distant grand castle is clearly outlined in the sunset glow, the two stand side by side beside the dragon bones, their cloaks and hair fluttering in the wind, warm golden sunset light fills the sky, restoring the epic scene like an animated film.
Shot 2 (Medium Shot, 4s) Side medium shot. The camera slowly pushes in. The swordswoman crosses her arms, tilts her head and raises her eyebrows, looking at the  adventurer with a teasing smile, asking  him playfully and surprisedly: “刚打完恶龙，你怎么不累啊？”
Shot 3 (Close-up Shot, 4s) Side close-up shot. The adventurer leans against the dragon’s ribs, holding a bottle of Master Kong Ice Tea in one hand, smiling helplessly yet proudly, replying humorously: “喝康师傅冰红茶！让我原地满血复活”
Shot 4 (Extreme Close-up, 2s) Detail close-up. The camera focuses on the beverages in the adventurer’s hand. The label on the bottle is clear and eye-catching, The drink in his hand was shining secretly under the sunlight, The background features the vines on the dragon skeleton, full of anime texture.
Shot 5 (Front Medium Shot, 3s) Fixed front medium shot. The camera faces the adventurer directly with a centered composition. He stands up, faces the camera, holds the ice tea high with one hand, and shouts the catchy Chinese line in a cheerful and playful tone: “勇者就喝康师傅冰红茶！” The background is the castle outline dyed red by the sunset glow, the frame is bright and clean, freezing the adventurer’s cool moment.
zhuanchang

转场lora，图生视频建议强度1。文生视频强度建议0.8以下。触发词zhuanchang
除了转场也可以增加动感

vbvr强度建议在0.8-1之间
